reasons: Khufra can disrupt Leomord's mounted mobility and chase pattern.
His tank control makes it harder for Leomord to freely run through the backline.

proof.summary: Leomord wants to chase through fights with mounted mobility, while Khufra can occupy his path and punish mobility attempts around the backline.
worksBestWhen: Khufra positions between Leomord and the low-health target.
Khufra saves control until Leomord commits mounted state.
failureCases: Khufra is forced away from the backline.
Leomord's team layers crowd control before Khufra can peel.

reasons: King's Calling can restrict directional Blink skills and create a punishing zone around Leomord's commit.
Leomord becomes easier to focus when he cannot freely chase through the fight.

proof.summary: Leomord wants extended chase mobility, while Minsitthar can zone the fight and restrict mobility options inside King's Calling.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar casts ultimate after Leomord commits.
The team focuses Leomord inside the zone.
failureCases: Leomord avoids the King's Calling area.
Leomord's team disengages and re-engages after the zone ends.

reasons: Valir can push Leomord away when Leomord tries to enter mounted chase range.
Slows and knockback reduce Leomord's ability to finish low-health targets.

proof.summary: Leomord wants to run down targets after mounting, while Valir can knock him back, slow his approach, and reset spacing.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves Searing Torrent for Leomord's mounted engage.
Teammates kite backward instead of fighting inside Leomord's threat range.
failureCases: Valir uses knockback before Leomord commits.
Leomord has crowd-control follow-up from teammates.

reasons: Kaja can suppress Leomord during mounted commit.
Suppression can stop Leomord from reaching low-health backliners during his strongest fight window.

proof.summary: Leomord wants uninterrupted chase after mounting, while Kaja can suppress and drag him away from the target.
worksBestWhen: Kaja waits until Leomord commits to the carry.
The team bursts Leomord during suppression.
failureCases: Kaja uses ultimate before Leomord mounts.
Kaja cannot reach Leomord through frontline pressure.

reasons: Karrie can punish Leomord if he builds durability and commits into extended fights.
Her max-HP true damage gives her a strong front-to-back answer when protected.

proof.summary: Leomord can become durable during fight commits, while Karrie's Lightwheel Mark converts repeated hits into max-HP true damage.
worksBestWhen: Karrie keeps distance while stacking marks.
failureCases: Leomord reaches Karrie before she can kite.
